buildCommand: rm -rf _vercel-kimi-out && if [ -f apps/wittgenstein-kimi/index.html ]; then mkdir -p _vercel-kimi-out && cp -R apps/wittgenstein-kimi/. _vercel-kimi-out/; elif [ -f wittgenstein-kimi/index.html ]; then mkdir -p _vercel-kimi-out && cp -R wittgenstein-kimi/. _vercel-kimi-out/; elif [ -f index.html ]; then mkdir -p _vercel-kimi-out && tar --exclude=_vercel-kimi-out -cf - . | tar -xf - -C _vercel-kimi-out; else echo 'Wittgenstein static deck not found (expected repo root, apps/, or apps/wittgenstein-kimi/).' >&2; exit 1; fi
